title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 5 Running Shoes
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.
AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

reviews.title: Great shoe!
reviews.text: Ordering shoes online sometimes is hard, because you're not sure what you will get.  I have ordered Asics many times and I have never been disappointed.  The fit is just right and you can't beat the quality.  These are keepers for sure.

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

I forget I am wearing them that is how comfortably light they are. LOVE THEM. I bought two more in different colors. I used them at the gym or long walks.

I usually wear a 10-10.5 but I wear an 11 in these (was fitting at a running shop). Went 2 miles this afternoon and was very happy with the responsiveness and comfort.

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.
features: 100% Synthetic

Cloudwave offers a plush stable and lively feel

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.

reviews.title: Great for disc golf
reviews.text: Image is my second attempt at patching a massive toe hole. Probably should just buy a new pair... These lasted through 4 months of pretty intense disc golf. All told, probably 350 miles of running on trails, through creeks and mud, etc. Not to mention repeated torsion on the fabric in a way it wasn't designed for. Through it all, these have dried quickly and remained comfortable. Not bad for $50, would buy again.

My existing pair has aged well, and after much wear, it has developed a tear in the inside lining near the heel.

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

title: Brooks Mens Ghost 12 Running Shoe
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported

THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Neutral runners looking for a lightweight shoe and a smooth ride without sacrificing cushioning. Whether you’re a Ghost loyalist or are lacing one up for the first time, you’ll find plenty to like.
SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The neutral support type provides high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 11
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: The newly engineered mesh and 3D Fit Print practically disappears on your foot with strategically placed stretch and structure.

reviews.title: I likes ‘em
reviews.text:
I’m not a runner so I can’t tell you what these or like for running in (though I’ve read good things about that), but I just wear them as every day, all around sneaks and they’re great for that. Great fit, cushy without making you feel like you’re going to fall over, and my previous pair of ghost 11s have held up nicely so I imagine these will too.

The instep on the shoes is just nylon mesh, so they’re anything but waterproof. They’re not even remotely water-resistant. But don’t expect that and I think you’ll probably be very happy with these shoes. Maybe not – different people’s feet are different and I’ve read a few reviews from people who aren’t thrilled with these. But for my part I’ve had a full range of shoes and sneakers over the years, some great and some not so much, and these are among the ones I’ve been happiest with. May you have a similar experience!

reviews.title: Comfy shoes

reviews.title: Over 900 miles, almost time for a new pair
reviews.text:
I work at a hospital, average 700+ miles a year at work, these have lasted 1.5 years but I wasn’t having to walk as much throughout Covid, things were a bit isolated in our hospital (largest university hospital in the Rocky Mountain region so we were busy but not spread out as usual).

Looking for my next pair since these are out of stock in my size.

Would love to see Brooks give health care workers a discount! But I’ll still pay since I know they are quality!

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Okay for casual, not a whole lot of support though
reviews.text: Cute shoe but not ideal for being on your feet for hours. I work 12 hour shifts and my heels were killing me the first 12 hour shift I worked in them. If comfort and stability is what you’re going for, I’d go with a different ASICS shoe. I wouldn’t ever run in them and I’m looking for inserts/a new work shoe but I’ll still wear them casually

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: ASICS Men's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FlyteFoam Midsole Technology - Our FlyteFoam technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
DuoMax Support System - A dual density midsole system positioned to enhance support and stability, positioned sport specifically.
Guidance Line Midsole Technology - Vertical flex groove decouples the tooling along the line of progression for enhanced gait efficiency.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology - This Trusstic System Technology integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Not as good as the old ones!
reviews.text: Shoes fit as advertised, though toebox is slightly narrower than previous GT series. Footbed is comfy, but lacks the support of earlier GT models. These feel like $45 shoes, not $120 shoes. Disappointed in these.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 24 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-CUMULUS 24 (Wide) shoe is a versatile everyday trainer for various runners covering different distances. From the upper to the foam underfoot, this shoe feels softer and more responsive. To improve comfort, the upper features an improved heel fit. Meanwhile, the engineered mesh improves breathability to keep your feet cool throughout your run. This smooth distance trainer is also updated with our FF BLAST cushioning. It helps create a softer landing and a more responsive toe-off.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FF BLAST cushioning: Creates lightweight impact absorption and a responsive energy return.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Gender-specific 3D SPACE CONSTRUCTION feature addresses different compression rates:
Engineered mesh upper: Improves breathability.
Reflective accents: Improves visibility in low-light conditions.

reviews.title: No more shin splints/heel pain
reviews.text: First impression out of the box was not super impressed with the look/quality for the price. However, they feel incredible for walking/running. Only time will tell in regards to longevity.

reviews.title: Great for bad joints
reviews.text: These are great for joint and back pain. I’m on my feet all day and they’re like a firm cloud!  I tried the nimbus but they seemed too soft for hard surfaces. The were so cushiony but I could feel the hard floor in the ball of my foot so I use them for walking in nature and these for harder surfaces. Size up a half. I wear 9.5 Asics but for nimbus and cumulus I had to go to 10

title: New Balance Men's FuelCell Rebel Tr V1 Running Shoe
description: Packed with the features you need for performance, the New Balance FuelCell Rebel TR men's running shoe provides the ultimate underfoot experience for athletes of any level. With FuelCell midsole foam and an ABZORB Dynamic Response System for impressive rebound, this shoe has the power to carry you through running, training, and everything in between. It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.
